name: @carlosrodrigo/pi-config
description: Personal pi extensions and themes — bordered editor, prompt queue, semantic search, verify, and more

scripts.test:direct: node --test agents/oracle.test.ts extensions/agent-jobs/agent-jobs.test.ts extensions/self-improvement-archive/self-improvement-archive.test.ts extensions/agent-benchmark/agent-benchmark.test.ts extensions/agent-memory/agent-memory.test.ts extensions/overseer/overseer.test.ts extensions/auto-prompt/auto-prompt.test.ts extensions/branch-switcher/branch-switcher.test.ts extensions/checkpoint-rollback/checkpoint-rollback.test.ts extensions/file-opener/file-opener.test.ts extensions/worktree-manager/worktree-manager.test.ts extensions/web-tools/web-tools.test.ts extensions/workflow-modes/workflow-modes.test.ts extensions/session-query/session-query.test.ts extensions/lazygit/lazygit.test.ts extensions/document-reviewer/review-flow.test.ts extensions/bordered-editor/bordered-editor.test.ts extensions/verify/verify.test.ts extensions/git-blame/git-blame.test.ts extensions/review-mode/review-mode.test.ts extensions/semantic-search/semantic-search.test.ts extensions/code-intel/code-intel.test.ts extensions/prompt-queue/prompt-queue.test.ts
scripts.test:typecheck: tsc --noEmit --allowImportingTsExtensions --module nodenext --moduleResolution nodenext --target es2022 --skipLibCheck --esModuleInterop extensions/*/index.ts extensions/lib/*.ts
scripts.test: npm run test:direct && npm run test:document-reviewer && npm run test:install && npm run test:typecheck && npm run test:package-smoke
